title: Milk Tea
steps: Boil milk with a little water.
Add tea leaves and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.

title: Masala Maggi
steps: Saute chopped onion and tomato for 2 minutes.
Add water and bring it to a boil.
Cook until the noodles are ready.

title: Vegetable Salad Bowl
steps: Season with salt, pepper, and lemon if available.

title: Sauteed Veg Mix
steps: Heat a little oil in a pan.
Add onion and cook until soft.
Add broccoli and carrot and cook until tender.

title: Apple Milk Smoothie
steps: Chop the apple into small pieces.
Blend apple with milk and sugar.
Pour into a glass and serve chilled.

title: Paneer Bhurji
steps: Saute onion and tomato in a pan.
Cook for a few minutes with salt and spices.

title: Bread Omelette
steps: Beat eggs with chopped onion and seasoning.
Cook the egg mixture on a pan.

title: Tomato Onion Sandwich
steps: Layer chopped tomato and onion between bread slices.
